title: விளையாட்டு நட்சத்திரங்கள் (Sports Stars - Prose) - மாதிரித் தேர்வு
subject: english

questions.question: Fill in the blank: Trichy is _____ from Chennai than Tindivanam.
questions.explanation: Grammar rule: 'farther' is used for physical distance, whereas 'further' means additional.

questions.question: At what age did Mithali Raj start playing cricket?
questions.explanation: Mithali Raj started playing cricket at the age of 10.

questions.question: Why was Usha Rani selected for the Karnataka State Police Force?
questions.explanation: Usha Rani was selected due to her excellence in sports, specifically her skills in Kabaddi.

questions.question: A girl sells vegetables to help family but dreams of winning a medal. Whose life resembles this?
questions.explanation: Usha Rani sold flowers to support her family while practicing Kabaddi.

questions.question: What sport did P.V. Sindhu's parents play professionally?
questions.explanation: Both of P.V. Sindhu's parents were professional volleyball players.

questions.question: Choose the correct order of adjectives:
options: A) A red small rectangular post-box
B) A small rectangular red post-box
C) A rectangular small red post-box
D) A small red rectangular post-box
questions.explanation: Correct order: Quantity → Quality → Size (small) → Shape (rectangular) → Colour (red).

questions.question: According to the glossary, what is the meaning of 'privilege'?
questions.explanation: The synonym and meaning of 'privilege' in this context is 'Honour'.

questions.question: Which sport is the second most popular in the world?
questions.explanation: Football is the 1st most popular globally, and Badminton is the 2nd.

questions.question: Who was the first woman cricketer to cross 6,000 runs in ODIs?
questions.explanation: Mithali Raj was the first woman to surpass the 6,000-run mark in ODIs.

questions.question: If a student wants their own identity like Mithali Raj, they would:
options: B) Want to be recognized by their own identity
questions.explanation: Mithali Raj prefers her own identity over being compared to male cricketers like Tendulkar.

questions.question: Choose the grammatically correct usage:
options: A) She is more stronger than her.
B) She is most stronger than her.
C) She is stronger than her.
D) She is strong than her.
questions.explanation: 'Strong' is a one-syllable adjective, so its comparative form takes '-er'. Double comparatives are incorrect.

questions.question: How many consecutive half-centuries did Mithali Raj score to set a record?
questions.explanation: Mithali Raj scored 7 consecutive 50s in women's international cricket.

questions.question: At what age did Usha Rani win a Gold Medal in Kabaddi?
questions.explanation: Usha Rani won a Gold Medal in Kabaddi at the age of 29.

questions.question: How did P.V. Sindhu manage her education after Class 9?
questions.explanation: She continued her studies through correspondence after Class 9.

questions.question: Practical solution from Sindhu's life to balance sports and study:
questions.explanation: Sindhu balanced training and education through correspondence, earning a B.Com degree.

questions.question: Correct order to describe 'sticks': long / two / brown.
questions.explanation: Order: Quantity (Two) → Size (long) → Colour (brown).

questions.question: From whom did P.V. Sindhu learn the basics of badminton?
questions.explanation: Sindhu learned basics from Mehboob Ali before joining Gopichand's academy.

questions.question: What is the antonym of 'Specific'?
questions.explanation: The opposite (antonym) of 'Specific' is 'General'.

questions.question: Which state does Usha Rani hail from?
questions.explanation: Usha Rani is from Bengaluru, Karnataka.

questions.question: Which phrase describes refusing to give up despite failures?
questions.explanation: The 'never-say-die spirit' means one doesn't stop trying despite difficulties.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: The coconut tree is 40 feet _____.
questions.explanation: 'High' is used for non-living things like trees and buildings; 'tall' is for people.

questions.question: What is Mithali Raj's mother tongue?
questions.explanation: Though she lives in Hyderabad, her mother tongue is Tamil.

questions.question: Which medal did P.V. Sindhu win at the 2016 Olympics?
questions.explanation: P.V. Sindhu won the Silver Medal at the 2016 Olympic Games.

questions.question: India won how many Women's Kabaddi World Cups (2012-2017)?
questions.explanation: India won all six World Cups played from 2012 to 2017.

questions.question: Inner drive that pushes a team to work hard despite losing:
questions.explanation: 'Passion' is a strong desire or dedication that drives performance.

questions.question: What was Usha Rani's specific goal mentioned?
questions.explanation: Her stated goal was to win Gold at the Asian Games 2018.

questions.question: Who won Bronze in badminton at the 2012 Olympics?
questions.explanation: Saina Nehwal won the Bronze at the 2012 Olympics.

questions.question: Synonym of 'Opponent' in sports:
questions.explanation: An opponent is someone you play against, a competitor or rival.

questions.question: In which year was the first Women's Cricket World Cup held?
questions.explanation: First held in 1973, two years before the Men's inaugural World Cup.

questions.question: Daily travel distance for Sindhu to reach the academy?
questions.explanation: Sindhu travelled 56 km daily to attend the academy.

questions.question: Which award is the highest sporting honour of India?
questions.explanation: Rajiv Gandhi Khel Ratna is India's highest sporting honour.

questions.question: Age of Sindhu when she broke into BWF top 20?
questions.explanation: She reached the top 20 in Sept 2012 at the age of 17.

questions.question: Mithali Raj is leading run-scorer in which formats?
questions.explanation: She is the all-time leading scorer across all formats for India.

questions.question: Meaning of 'Shanty town'?
questions.explanation: A shanty town is defined as a poor area.

questions.question: Who scored unbeaten 76 runs in T20 against South Africa (2018)?
questions.explanation: Mithali Raj scored an unbeaten 76 in that match.

questions.question: Equipment for Archery?
questions.explanation: Archery uses a Bow and Arrow.

questions.question: True or False: Mithali Raj was NOT encouraged by her family.
questions.explanation: False; the text states she received support and encouragement.

questions.question: In which city does Mithali Raj live?
questions.explanation: As per the text, Mithali Raj resides in Hyderabad.

questions.question: Who inspired P.V. Sindhu?
questions.explanation: She was inspired by Pullela Gopichand (2001 Champion).

questions.question: Antonym of 'Appoint'?
questions.explanation: The opposite of 'Appoint' is 'Dismiss' or 'Fire'.
